title: Yellow Snow
description: A mod which adds yellow snow to Minecraft. Made for WinterJam.
body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/)
**[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)**
A mod created for **WinterJam 2020**.

Adds yellow snow to the game. Yellow snow balls deal damage to entities.

How to get yellow snow? Just pee on normal vanilla snow.

Some stuff can be configured in the config file.

![Creative Tab](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/yellow-snow/creative_tab.png)

You are allowed to put this mod in any modpack you like.
